metadata.description: Official Caputchin agent skills: integrate verification, verify tokens, manage via MCP, and build verification games.

plugins.name: caputchin
plugins.description: Integrate and operate Caputchin (a game-based human-verification and CAPTCHA-alternative service) and build verification games. Bundles two skills: caputchin (widget integration, server-side verify, MCP management, troubleshooting) and caputchin-game-development.
